executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Whole-stack certification is still blocked by the marketing owner loop; architecture-owned topology and verifier state are coherent.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Do not certify green until marketing produces a fresh independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement on Codeberg.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Marketing owner loop remains the only live blocker to whole-stack green
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo adoption is measurement-pending after shipped repairs.
findings.root_cause: Codeberg adoption is flat across the recent window, while Reddit and Apollo remain externally constrained, so outcome proof is still missing.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep the blocker owned by marketing and require measurable Codeberg movement before any healthy certification.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology is aligned with the architecture audit
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows 23 total jobs, 23 enabled, 0 disabled, and no live last-error jobs.
findings.root_cause: The audit is synced to direct live scheduler state instead of persisted-history drift.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep topology checks bound to `openclaw cron list --json` and continue separating persisted disabled history from live runtime state.

findings.title: Architecture verifier chain is healthy in qualified form
findings.mechanism: Independent verification and verifier signoff pass while isolating the remaining blocker to marketing ownership.
findings.root_cause: Fresh runtime evidence is coherent and architecture-owned blockers are clear.
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun independent verification after every material architecture-audit refresh.

findings.title: Shared market-intelligence reuse remains machine-verifiable
findings.mechanism: Runtime consumer proof still exists for code-backed marketing consumers.
findings.root_cause: The shared market-intelligence artifact is loaded or intentionally skipped by required consumers with explicit status.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep required consumer proof wired into the independent verifier.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs remain history only
findings.mechanism: jobs.json still contains historical disabled entries, but the live scheduler has zero disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after live cleanup.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue reporting persisted disabled history separately from live runtime topology.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Let the marketing owner loop clear measurement_pending status with measurable Codeberg movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: It is the only blocker to whole-stack green.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the blocker or preserves a truthful fail-closed marketing verdict with current evidence.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture signoff synced to direct live cron topology and refreshed health-monitor evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Topology drift was previously a false architecture incident source.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Prevents stale scheduler-state defects from reappearing as architecture blockers.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep shared market-intelligence consumption proof in the verification chain
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Cross-loop reuse is part of the architecture contract.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Prevents isolated loops from silently diverging away from shared findings.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Reran the marketing runner bundle so the current blocker is backed by fresh workflow-audit, momentum-watchdog, and independent-verification evidence.
Reran loop_integrity_audit.py and health_monitor.py so live topology, issue ownership, and verifier side-effects reflect the current runtime.
Reran agent_architecture_independent_verify.py, agent_architecture_verifier.py, and agent_architecture_checker.py; the architecture verifier passes in qualified form against fresh runtime evidence.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement on Codeberg.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing still fails closed on primary-repo outcome proof
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Marketing independent verification remains red because Codeberg adoption is still flat inside the current measurement window.

notes: Architecture-owned runtime topology is currently clean: 23 total jobs, 23 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 live last-error jobs.
Marketing evidence was refreshed this run; the remaining blocker is localized to measurement-pending outcome proof in the marketing owner loop.
Docs remains green and stable across the current verification window.
Persisted disabled jobs remain history only and are not part of the live scheduler topology.
